reviews.comment:
Lo peor en estaciones de servicio. Se abusan porque ahi estás lejos de todo. No hay gomeria y cuidado por ahí llegas y no tienen combustible. Mala atención, si pedís alguna orientación a cerca de algún camino o ruta cercana. No saben

(Translated by Google)
The worst gas stations. They take advantage of you because you're far from everything. There's no tire shop, and be careful—you might arrive and they're out of fuel. The service is terrible; if you ask for directions to a nearby road or route, they don't know.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0Mkl5SW9nRRAB
